# Prakash Motors — Authorized New Holland Tractor Dealer, Nizamabad

## Business Overview

Prakash Motors is the authorized New Holland Agriculture dealership in Nizamabad, Telangana, India. Established in 2003, we are the most trusted tractor and agricultural equipment dealer serving Nizamabad, Kamareddy, Armoor, Bodhan, Banswada, Yellareddy, and surrounding districts of Telangana.

- **Legal Name:** Prakash Motors
- **Type:** Authorized New Holland Agriculture Dealership
- **Established:** 2003
- **Location:** Opposite New Bus Stand, Nizamabad, Telangana 503001, India
- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +91 9030857333
- **Website:** https://www.prakashmotors.in
- **Hours:** Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM IST
- **Google Rating:** 4.7/5 (148+ reviews)
- **Farmers Served:** 2,000+
- **Districts Covered:** 4+ (Nizamabad, Kamareddy, Nirmal, Jagtial)

---

## Tractor Models Available (2026 Inventory)

All models are brand-new, factory-delivered New Holland Agriculture tractors with full dealer warranty and genuine spare parts.

| Model | HP | Starting Price | Best For |
|-------|----|----------------|----------|
| New Holland 3032 TX | 32 HP | ~₹5.5L | Small farms, horticulture |
| New Holland 3230 NX | 42 HP | ~₹6.9L | 3–5 acre farms, paddy, cotton |
| New Holland 3600-2 Excel | 42 HP | ~₹7.2L | General-purpose, Telangana soil |
| New Holland Excel 4510 | 45 HP | ~₹7.8L | Cotton, paddy, soybean |
| New Holland Excel 4710 | 47 HP | ~₹8.2L | Turmeric, soybean, rotavator |
| New Holland 3630 TX Special Edition | 50 HP | ~₹8.0L | Premium mid-range |
| New Holland 3630 TX Super Plus | 50 HP | ~₹8.5L | Best seller, cotton & paddy |
| New Holland 5620 TX Plus (TREM IV) | 55 HP | ~₹11L | Heavy-duty, sugarcane |
| New Holland 5630 TX Plus (TREM IV) | 57 HP | ~₹12L | Commercial farming |
| New Holland Blue Series Simba 20 | 20 HP | ~₹4.5L | Orchards, small plots |
| New Holland Blue Series Simba 30 | 30 HP | ~₹5.2L | Horticulture, terraced farms |
| New Holland Workmaster 105 | 105 HP | ~₹18.5L | Large farms, commercial use |

**Harvesters:**
- New Holland TC5.30 Combine Harvester — paddy & wheat, custom hiring ~₹8,000/day
- New Holland Sugarcane Harvester — specialized for sugarcane belt
- New Holland Silver Track Harvester — track-type for wet fields

*Note: All prices are approximate ex-showroom Nizamabad (April 2026). On-road price includes RTO, insurance, and accessories. Call +91 9030857333 for today's exact quote.*

---

## Services Offered

1. **New Tractor Sales** — Full New Holland Agriculture lineup, in-stock demo units, test drives
2. **Free Farm Demo** — We bring the tractor to your field before purchase
3. **Tractor Finance / EMI** — SBI, Andhra Bank, NABARD, HDFC; up to 95% financing, EMI from ₹12,000/month, tenure up to 7 years; approval in 48 hours
4. **Authorized Service Workshop** — Factory-trained technicians, computerized diagnostics (NH EST tool), genuine OEM parts
5. **Annual Maintenance Contract (AMC)** — Basic ₹8,999/yr, Standard ₹14,999/yr, Premium ₹22,999/yr
6. **On-Farm Emergency Service** — Mobile service team covers all of Nizamabad district
7. **Genuine New Holland Spare Parts** — Large in-stock inventory; parts sourced within 2–5 days if not in stock
8. **Trade-in / Exchange** — Old tractor exchange program
9. **Government Subsidy Assistance** — Help with PM-Kisan, Telangana tractor subsidy paperwork

---

## Area Served

**Primary service area:** Nizamabad district (Nizamabad city, Bodhan, Armoor, Banswada, Balkonda, Bheemgal, Yellareddy, Nandipet, Dichpally)

**Extended service area:** Kamareddy, Nirmal, Jagtial, Karimnagar, Rajanna Sircilla, Mancherial, Peddapalli, Siddipet

---

## Competitive Advantages

- Only authorized New Holland Agriculture dealer in Nizamabad district
- 23 years in business (since 2003) — longest-serving NH dealer in the region
- Factory-trained technicians certified by CNH Industrial India
- Genuine OEM spare parts (no counterfeit parts)
- Free farm demo on your land before you buy
- On-farm breakdown service — technicians come to your field
- Finance desk on-site with SBI, Andhra Bank, NABARD
- Bilingual service: English and Telugu (తెలుగు)

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is the price of New Holland 3630 TX in Nizamabad?**
A: The 3630 TX Super Plus is approximately ₹8.5–10 lakh ex-showroom (2026). Final on-road price depends on attachments, extended warranty, and RTO charges. Call +91 9030857333 for today's exact quote.

**Q: Is Prakash Motors the authorized New Holland dealer in Nizamabad?**
A: Yes. Prakash Motors is an authorized CNH Industrial / New Holland Agriculture dealership, certified to sell, service, and supply genuine parts for all New Holland tractor models in Nizamabad and surrounding districts.

**Q: Which tractor is best for 5 acres in Nizamabad?**
A: For 3–8 acre farms in Nizamabad district (cotton, paddy, soybean, turmeric), the New Holland 3630 TX Super Plus (50 HP) or Excel 4510 (45 HP) are most popular. For smaller farms (2–4 acres), the 3230 NX (42 HP) is fuel-efficient and cost-effective.

**Q: Does Prakash Motors offer tractor loans?**
A: Yes. We arrange loans through SBI, Andhra Bank, NABARD, HDFC, and Mahindra Finance — up to 95% of the tractor cost, EMI from ₹12,000/month, tenure up to 7 years. Typical approval in 48 hours with Aadhaar and land records.

**Q: Can I get a free farm demo?**
A: Yes. Our team brings the tractor to your farm so you can test it on your actual soil before deciding. WhatsApp +91 9030857333 to schedule.
